$comment: Label taxonomy consumed by the evaluation pipeline and pushed to GitHub via `node scripts/sync-labels.mjs`. Colors are GitHub hex without '#'.

labels.name: area:security
labels.description: Key handling, IPC validation, capture invisibility

labels.name: difficulty:intermediate
labels.description: Touches one subsystem, needs repo context

labels.name: bounty:test
labels.description: Maintainer-approved: test coverage work — priced up because SN74 underweights tests

labels.name: bounty:docs
labels.description: Maintainer-approved: documentation work — priced up because SN74 underweights docs

labels.name: bounty:security
labels.description: Maintainer-approved: security hardening (disclosure rules in SECURITY.md apply)

labels.name: eval:pass
labels.description: Automated evaluation passed — in the merge queue

labels.name: eval:needs-work
labels.description: Automated evaluation found actionable problems — fix window open, not a rejection

labels.name: eval:human
labels.description: Evaluation escalated to a human (disagreement, size, or sensitive surface)
